seo_data.generated_keywords: POCO M7, smartphone, 7000mAh battery, 33W fast charging, 18W reverse charging, 6.9 inch FHD+ display, 144Hz refresh rate, Snapdragon 685, 50MP AI camera, 16GB RAM, 2TB expandable storage, IP64, NFC, Dolby Atmos, Xiaomi HyperOS 2
seo_data.meta_title: POCO M7 - Massive Battery, 144Hz Display, Snapdragon 685
seo_data.meta_description: Experience the POCO M7 with its massive 7000mAh battery, immersive 6.9" FHD+ 144Hz display, powerful Snapdragon 685, and 50MP AI dual camera.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The POCO M7 redefines smartphone endurance with its massive 7000mAh (typ) battery, the largest ever for POCO's global markets. This powerhouse supports 33W turbo charging for quick power-ups and innovative 18W reverse charging, allowing it to double as a portable power bank. Engineered for longevity, its battery maintains over 80% original capacity even after 1,600 charge cycles and features a BatteryExtender Chip for robust performance in low temperatures, ensuring reliable use for extended video playback, calling, and reading.

Beyond its exceptional battery life, the POCO M7 offers a superior user experience with its immersive 6.9-inch FHD+ DotDisplay, boasting a 144Hz AdaptiveSync refresh rate and 288Hz touch sampling for ultra-smooth visuals and responsiveness. Powered by the efficient 6nm Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform, it delivers stable performance for multitasking, supported by up to 16GB of extended RAM and up to 2TB of expandable storage. The device also features a clear 50MP AI dual camera, an 8MP front camera, IP64 water and dust resistance, NFC, and Hi-Res Audio with Dolby Atmos®, all housed within a comfortable quad-curved design running on Xiaomi HyperOS 2.

range_overview:
The POCO M7 stands out with its unprecedented 7000mAh (typ) battery, marking it as POCO's largest smartphone battery for global markets to date. This massive power source ensures ultra-long battery life, supporting up to 2.32 days of light daily use, 28 hours of video playback, or 46 hours of calling. Complementing this endurance are 33W turbo charging for rapid recharges and 18W reverse charging, transforming the device into a convenient portable power bank. The integrated BatteryExtender Chip ensures strong performance even in challenging low-temperature environments, while its robust design maintains over 80% original capacity after 1,600 charge cycles, promising lasting reliability.

Visually, the POCO M7 delivers an immersive experience through its 6.9-inch FHD+ DotDisplay. This large screen features a 144Hz AdaptiveSync refresh rate, intelligently adjusting across 9 levels for smooth visuals and improved viewing comfort, alongside a responsive 288Hz touch sampling rate. Eye health is prioritized with multiple TÜV Rheinland certifications for Low Blue Light, Flicker Free, and Circadian Friendly display, enhanced by DC dimming. The innovative Wet Touch Technology 2.0 ensures accurate screen response even with wet or oily fingers.

Under the hood, the POCO M7 is driven by the powerful Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform, built on an efficient 6nm process. This octa-core chipset, featuring a Qualcomm® Kryo™ CPU up to 2.8GHz and Qualcomm® Adreno™ GPU, provides stable performance with improved efficiency and lower power consumption. Multitasking is seamless with support for up to 16GB of extended RAM and ample storage options, including up to 2TB of expandable storage via microSD. Photography is handled by a clear 50MP AI dual camera system and an 8MP front camera, offering various modes for creative capture. Additional features include IP64 water and dust resistance, NFC, Hi-Res Audio with Dolby Atmos®, a side fingerprint sensor, AI face unlock, and the intuitive Xiaomi HyperOS 2 operating system, all encased in a comfortable quad-curved design.
sales_arguments: Experience ultra-long usage with POCO's largest 7000mAh (typ) battery, offering up to 2.32 days of use and robust low-temperature performance.
Recharge rapidly with 33W turbo charging and share power with 18W reverse charging, turning your POCO M7 into a portable power bank.
Immerse yourself in a cinematic 6.9-inch FHD+ DotDisplay featuring a 144Hz AdaptiveSync refresh rate and multiple eye-care certifications.
Enjoy smooth and efficient performance powered by the Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform, complemented by up to 16GB extended RAM and 2TB expandable storage.
Capture clear and vibrant moments with the 50MP AI dual camera and benefit from IP64 water and dust resistance for everyday durability.

technical_specifications.Eye Care Certifications: TÜV Rheinland Low Blue Light (Software Solution) Certified, TÜV Rheinland Flicker Free Certified, TÜV Rheinland Circadian Friendly Certified
technical_specifications.Security: Side fingerprint sensor, AI face unlock
technical_specifications.Sensors: Virtual proximity sensor, Ambient light sensor, Accelerometer, Electronic compass, IR blaster
technical_specifications.Charging Engine: Smart Charging Engine 2.0 (Zero Power Instant On, Battery Health 4.0, Low-battery fast charging, Smart battery protection)
technical_specifications.Display Features: 9-level adaptive refresh rate, DC dimming, Wet touch technology 2.0
